svg.title: demo-api SLO error-budget-burn dashboard (illustrative mock)
svg.desc: An illustrative, hand-drawn diagram of the demo-api SLO burn Grafana dashboard. It shows steady request rate with an error spike (the chaos burn) that recovers after auto-remediation, an error-budget-remaining gauge that drains from 100 percent toward zero and then recovers, and fast/slow burn-rate stat panels that flip red during the burn and back to green after recovery. This is an illustration, not a real screenshot — run make demo-up and make demo-screenshots for live dashboards.

g.text: ⚠ ILLUSTRATIVE MOCK — this is a hand-drawn diagram, NOT a real screenshot. Run `make demo-up && make demo-screenshots` for live dashboards.
MTTR = detect → sustain-gate → restart (seconds, no human round-trip)

svg.text: Diagram of dashboard uid `demo-api-slo-burn` (observability/grafana/dashboards/demo-api-slo-burn.json). Numbers are illustrative.
